title: Fully Hisuian Starters (Cobblemon)
description: a Cobblemon Resource pack that makes The Hisui Bias Starters Look like their final Evolution
body:
makes the Hisui Bias Starters in Cobblemon look like their final evolution
![Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5vRvzDPO/images/e651b67ad6d0c93679aae54fd1dd28888d72c027.png)

What this Changes:

Cyndaquil Regional_Bias=Hisui

Quilava Regional_Bias=Hisui

Rowlet Regional_Bias=Hisui 

Dartrix Regional_Bias=Hisui

Oshawott Regional_Bias=Hisui

Dewott Regional_Bias=Hisui

## **FaQ**
Q: Do I need this as a datapack?                                                                                                       
A: No, this is only a Resource Pack, meaning it can also be used on servers.

Q: How do I get them?                                                                               
A: They can all be found in the wild in their respective biomes since they're already different forms in normal Cobblemon. They can also be selected as starters in the starter menu in the "Hisui" section, or can be obtained/spawned via /pokespawn (Pokemon here) regional_bias=hisui or /pokegive (Pokemon here) regional_bias=hisui.


You can include this in modpacks
